utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Checking the final property solution: (1) property – fully detailed with type, price, location, condition, size, and features; (2) financing – includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, term, and notes; (3) legal_services – includes service name and cost; (4) moving_services – includes description and cost; (5) setup_services – includes utilities and survey details with costs; (6) total_budget – includes property cost, total services cost, grand total, and currency. All six items are present and fully specified with appropriate details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution proposes purchasing a detached 4-bedroom family home in Oakville for CAD $875,000 using a mortgage with partial home equity, along with several service selections. To map these choices, we must find the closest corresponding items in the ground-truth dataset. The property type (Detached 4-bedroom home, modern, suburban, family-oriented, within CAD $850K–950K) most closely aligns with 'Family House' (rating 10) among purchase properties. The financing method, a standard fixed-rate mortgage using equity, corresponds to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 9). The legal service selected is 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 8). The moving service described as 'Full household relocation for 4-bedroom family home' best matches 'Premium Moving' (rating 9), given the cost (CAD $1200) and full-service nature. The utility setup cost (CAD $280) matches 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9), and the property survey/inspection cost (CAD $650) corresponds to 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9).
